result.stdout:
VeriSol: Formal specification and verification tool for Solidity smart contracts
Usage:  VeriSol <relative-path-to-solidity-file> <top-level-contractName> [options]
options:

------ Controls verification flags --------

   /noChk                  don't perform verification, default: false
   /noPrf                  don't perform inductive verification, default: false
   /txBound:k              only explore counterexamples with at most k transactions/loop unrollings, default: 4
   /noTxSeq                don't print the transaction sequence on console, default: false
   /contractInfer          perform Houdini based module invariant inference, default off
   /inlineDepth:k          inline nested calls upto depth k when performing modular proof and inference, default 4

------ Controls translation --------

   /ignoreMethod:<method>@<contract>: Ignores translation of the method within contract, and only generates a declaration
                           multiple such pairs can be specified, ignored set is the union
                           a wild card '*' can be used for method, would mean all the methods of the contract
   /noInlineAttrs          do not generate any {:inline x} attributes, to speed Corral (cannot use with /tryProof)
   /stubModel:<s>          the model of an unknown procedure or fallback. <s> can be either
                           skip      // treated as noop
                           havoc     // completely scramble the entire global state
                           callback  // treated as a non-deterministic callback into any of the methods of any contract
   /useModularArithmetic   uses modular arithmetic for unsigned integers (experimental), default unbounded integers

VeriSol: Formal specification and verification tool for Solidity smart contracts
Usage:  VeriSol <relative-path-to-solidity-file> <top-level-contractName> [options]
options:

------ Controls verification flags --------

   /noChk                  don't perform verification, default: false
   /noPrf                  don't perform inductive verification, default: false
   /txBound:k              only explore counterexamples with at most k transactions/loop unrollings, default: 4
   /noTxSeq                don't print the transaction sequence on console, default: false
   /contractInfer          perform Houdini based module invariant inference, default off
   /inlineDepth:k          inline nested calls upto depth k when performing modular proof and inference, default 4

------ Controls translation --------

   /ignoreMethod:<method>@<contract>: Ignores translation of the method within contract, and only generates a declaration
                           multiple such pairs can be specified, ignored set is the union
                           a wild card '*' can be used for method, would mean all the methods of the contract

   /stubModel:<s>          the model of an unknown procedure or fallback. <s> can be either

                           callback  // treated as a non-deterministic callback into any of the methods of any contract
   /useModularArithmetic   uses modular arithmetic for unsigned integers (experimental), default unbounded integers
